headline: Is Apple (AAPL) Still Fairly Priced After Recent Services Revenue Strength?
summary: This article examines whether Apple shares at around US$264 still represent reasonable value or are beginning to look expensive, by walking through what the numbers suggest about valuation. Apple's share price most recently closed at US$264.18, with returns of a 0.2% decline over 7 days, 1.8% over 30 days, a 2.5% decline year to date and 9.7% over the last year, while the 3 year and 5 year returns sit at 77.5% and 123.4% respectively. Recent headlines around Apple have continued to focus on...

headline: Apple introduces the new iPad Air, powered by M4
summary: CUPERTINO, Calif., March 02, 2026--Apple® today announced the new iPad Air® featuring M4 and more memory, giving users a big jump in performance at the same starting price. With a faster CPU and GPU, iPad Air boosts tasks like editing and gaming, and is a powerful device for AI with a faster Neural Engine, higher memory bandwidth, and 50 percent more unified system memory than the previous generation. With M4, iPad Air is up to 30 percent faster than iPad Air with M3,1 and up to 2.3x faster than

At the heart of iPhone 17e is the latest-generation A19, which delivers exceptional performance for everything users do. iPhone 17e also features C1X, the latest-generation cellular modem designed by Apple, which is up to 2x faster than C1 in iPhone 16e. headline: Apple’s Arizona Chip Orders Reinforce TSMC’s Role In U.S. Supply Chain
summary: Apple has agreed to purchase more than 100 million advanced chips from Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (NYSE:TSM), produced at TSMC's Arizona facility. The orders relate to chips made on advanced process technology and tie directly to Apple's future U.S.-based device production plans. The move marks a step in the shift of part of Apple's semiconductor sourcing to U.S. manufacturing capacity. For you as an investor, this development sits at the intersection of TSMC's core role as a...

headline: Apple Announces New iPhone and iPad Air as Week of Launches Begins
summary: Apple  kicked off what’s expected to be a week of product launches by announcing a new iPhone and iPad model on Monday.  The tech giant announced the introduction of two new products, including the iPhone 17e, which will be the lowest priced option in the iPhone 17 lineup.  The iPhone 17e features a cellular modem made by  Apple  the C1X, which the company says is twice as fast as the C1 modem in the iPhone 16e.

content.title: Apple Announces New iPhone and iPad Air as Week of Launches Begins
content.summary: Apple  kicked off what’s expected to be a week of product launches by announcing a new iPhone and iPad model on Monday.  The tech giant announced the introduction of two new products, including the iPhone 17e, which will be the lowest priced option in the iPhone 17 lineup.  The iPhone 17e features a cellular modem made by  Apple  the C1X, which the company says is twice as fast as the C1 modem in the iPhone 16e.
